ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year for the record */,
  "revenue_or_spending" TEXT /* Type of financial record (revenue or spending) */,
  "related_govt_units" TEXT /* Related government units */,
  "org_group" TEXT /* Organization group */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program */,
  "character" TEXT /* Character of the financial record */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object of the financial record */,
  "sub_object" TEXT /* Sub-object of the financial record */,
  "fund" TEXT /* Fund */,
  "fund_category" TEXT /* Fund category */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of revenue or spending */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of financial transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the financial transaction */,
  "transaction_ref" TEXT /* Reference number or ID of the financial transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the financial transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the financial transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the financial transaction */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the financial transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_fiscal_year FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_character FOREIGN KEY ("character") REFERENCES financial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_program FOREIGN KEY ("program") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_fund FOREIGN KEY ("fund") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_org_group FOREIGN KEY ("org_group") REFERENCES org_groups ("org_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_fund_category FOREIGN KEY ("fund_category") REFERENCES fund_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_related_govt_units FOREIGN KEY ("related_govt_units") REFERENCES govt_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* The fiscal year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "org_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_org_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_group_id") REFERENCES org_groups ("org_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_manager" TEXT /* Manager of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* Description of the fund */,
  "fund_source" TEXT /* Source of the fund */,
  "fund_category" TEXT /* Category of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial object */,
  "character" TEXT /* Character of the financial object */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object of the financial object */,
  "sub_object" TEXT /* Sub-object of the financial object */,
  "object_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "govt_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the government unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the government unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_groups" (
  "org_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization group */,
  "org_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization group */,
  "org_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the fund category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each financial record
Type of financial record (revenue or spending)
Reference number or ID of the financial transaction
User who created the financial transaction
Date and time when the financial transaction was created
User who last updated the financial transaction
Date and time when the financial transaction was last updated
Unique identifier for each fiscal year
Start date of the fiscal year
End date of the fiscal year
Unique identifier for each financial object
Unique identifier for each government unit
Unique identifier for each organization group
Unique identifier for each fund category
Reference to the role of the user
Reference to the role of the permission
